narrative.description: Game Arts' Sega CD showcase combines pre-rendered cinematic backdrops with polygon ship combat, letting players customize weapon loadouts while blasting through fleet assaults defending Earth colony ships.
narrative.core_loop: Select weapon configurations between stages, dodge dense bullet formations, destroy enemy capital ships, and protect the colony fleet through twelve missions.

mechanics.map_notes: Twelve cinematic missions each end with a capital-ship boss encounter.
mechanics.expression: Twelve cinematic missions each end with a capital-ship boss encounter.

mechanics.map_notes: Pre-mission weapon select swaps primary and secondary gun configurations.
mechanics.expression: Pre-mission weapon select swaps primary and secondary gun configurations.

mechanics.map_notes: Enemy fleets emit dense, Gradius-style bullet curtains across 3D lanes.
mechanics.expression: Enemy fleets emit dense, Gradius-style bullet curtains across 3D lanes.

mechanics.map_notes: Primary weapons fire immediately without charge delay.
mechanics.expression: Primary weapons fire immediately without charge delay.

mechanics.map_notes: Shield bar depletes from impacts; no health pickups mid-stage.
mechanics.expression: Shield bar depletes from impacts; no health pickups mid-stage.

mechanics.map_notes: Secondary weapons consume energy meters during sustained fire.
mechanics.expression: Secondary weapons consume energy meters during sustained fire.

mechanics.map_notes: Capital ship bosses expose weak points during learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Capital ship bosses expose weak points during learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Large turrets wind up before releasing laser sweeps.
mechanics.expression: Large turrets wind up before releasing laser sweeps.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss ships shed armor layers revealing new attack patterns.
mechanics.expression: Boss ships shed armor layers revealing new attack patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Asteroid fields and debris constrain safe movement corridors.
mechanics.expression: Asteroid fields and debris constrain safe movement corridors.

mechanics.map_notes: Mission select resumes from last cleared stage.
mechanics.expression: Mission select resumes from last cleared stage.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Silpheed through its core shooter loop.
